title: Stop Watching Tutorials - Build These 4 Claude Projects to 10x Output
summary: Austin Marchese presents four Claude Code projects: an AI Board of Advisors, a niche command center, an AI-optimized personal website, and an internal operating system. The video emphasizes hands-on building over passive tutorial consumption and demonstrates productivity gains using Claude for code generation.
